markdownTool.description: Instant Markdown rendering, formatted HTML export, and WeChat public account formatting.
markdownTool.title: Markdown Rendering Tool
markdownTool.subtitle: Instant preview, HTML export, and WeChat formatting.
markdownTool.placeholder: Write body text, headings, lists, or code blocks
markdownTool.wechatRichCopied: Rich text copied; paste it into the WeChat editor
markdownTool.htmlOnly: This browser can only copy HTML source
markdownTool.sampleMarkdown:
# Spring Note

Today I turned a rough draft into a publishable version. Headings, quotes, lists, and code blocks stay in the body to test hierarchy and spacing after pasting.

## Observations

- **Rhythm**: paragraphs need breathing room.
- **Focus**: bold text and links should not overpower headings.
- **Tables**: borders should stay light while information remains steady.

> Writing is not stacking sentences; it is helping readers want to continue.

## Code Snippet

```javascript
function publishDraft(title) {
    return title + ' is ready';
}
```

## Table

| Module | Checkpoint |
|--------|------------|
| Heading | Clear hierarchy |
| Body | Comfortable line height |
| Quote | Clear boundary |

---

**Conclusion**: before copying to WeChat, make the preview match the publishing shape.
